caption: Awesome jam today with the talented @dominika_mak! Playing with vocals and FX in my new project - a multiplayer looper called Samsara. Try it out yourself, it's free on MacOS as standalone and VST. The way it works is your Mac runs the loops and audio interface. Then you can control it with a phone or tablet on the same Wi-Fi. It's such fun and I'm so excited to see it come together - I've wanted this since working on @endlesssfm 6 years ago!

Made this artificial life thing. Plant like creatures breed and hybridise in a small floating world. 3D Petri dish. Thinking about how I can link music to it so the creatures respond in real time to tempo and mood. Try it for yourself, link on my GitHub. Works best on desktop 🤓✨

How free do you feel? How do you relate to strangers, to friends, to yourself? How comfortable are you in your own skin? In the way you move? How do you deal with reaching out to meet someone? How do you deal with rejection? It amazes me how the simple act of dancing with others can serve as a safe space to explore all these themes - intuitively, without much guidance besides a 15 minute facilitation at the start of a set. #ecstaticdance can be so many things but to me it’s been life changing and mind blowing. I’m grateful to everyone in this scene running dances and playing at them, and all the dancers that I see several times a week. The simple act of coming together - all genders, sexualities, backgrounds and creeds - is a radical act of protest in these troubled times. In the original spirit of the rave movement, in the original spirit of Ecstatic Dance, we create community that extends beyond the dance floor and relationships that transcend all boundaries. I love you all, keep dancing! 🙏💖✨

Brothers sisters and siblings - I'm planning a classic rave moment for @ecstaticdance.uk tomorrow. This one came out in *1988* and wow it's message is still so relevant. Sending love to everyone caught in the warzones out there, I'm gutted my government is so deep in the pocket of the US military machine. We come together, all backgrounds and genders and dance in solidarity. 💜🕊️✌️☮️ 
(ID: Joe Smooth - Promised Land)
#classicrave #rave

So many huge tunes to play this Sunday 22nd March at @ecstaticdance.uk, can't wait! I’ll be playing a multi genre set everything from Vivaldi to dancehall, plus a few of my own remixes and originals. If you know me know, you know I dance at ED UK a LOT, so it’s a huge honour to be leading the ceremony in a space I love so much. Hope to see you there!

Really excited to announce my new EP, Lucid Crystal Temple is out today. 
Inspired by a spiritual experience in early 2020, these tracks are ambient reflections of a temporarily lucid state of mind. The entire EP was recorded using just one virtual modelling instrument over one week, using a microtuning designed to produce very clear, transparent sounds. (#justintonation, tuning nerds 🤓) #ambient
